signedOut.description: Sign in to view group chats from tours and start direct messages with other users.

header.description: Here you will find direct chats and group chats you are part of.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.empty: You have no chats yet. Start a new conversation or wait for a group tour to be locked.

chat.selectHint: Select a conversation in the inbox, or start a new chat.
chat.empty: No messages yet. Send the first message to start the conversation.

image.hidden: The image is hidden until you approve it

newChat.title: Start new chat
newChat.description: Search for a user and create a direct message.
newChat.minChars: Type at least two characters to search for users.
